title: Google reveals it holds $94.1bn in SpaceX shares after the IPO
summary: Google spent years as a low-key backer of SpaceX. In a quarterly filing , Alphabet said its Google unit holds $94.1bn in SpaceX shares, following the rocket company’s record IPO.
